author: mai
notes: v175 is a single targeted E2E fix (skip cmdk recent items test — cmdk click does not trigger onSelect reliably). The underlying codebase is mature and well-structured: monorepo with proper separation (apps/api, apps/web, packages/types, packages/db, packages/ui), Biome linting enforced, tRPC with Zod input/output schemas throughout. Security posture is strong: AES-256-GCM credential encryption, configurable rate limiting via @fastify/rate-limit, CORS with explicit origin allowlist, session expiry control, auth guard middleware, and full audit logging on login/mutations. TypeScript strict mode enabled globally (tsconfig.base.json), discriminated unions used for provider connection configs, shared @voyager/types package with contract schemas. Test coverage: 29 unit/integration tests (vitest) + 29 E2E specs (Playwright) covering auth, RBAC, BYOK flow, cluster ops, API tokens, and UI navigation. Documentation includes docs/API.md (255 lines), MODERNIZATION-ROADMAP, JSDoc on all crypto utilities, and inline code comments. Minor deductions: test_coverage lacks reported % metric for unit tests; error_handling has one non-critical swallowed catch in audit hook (console.error only). Overall: solid production-ready state.
